tsc.web: pre-existing TS2578 in formatWaitingTime.test.ts only (unchanged on main, unrelated)

notes:
Feature: SUPER_ADMIN-only CRUD at /admin/clients (search, list, create, edit, delete with FK-safe 409 when bookings exist) + client name autocomplete on /bookings/new (debounced 200 ms, keyboard-navigable combobox with ARIA, '+ Добавить нового клиента' action at bottom when no match).

Review findings (3 HIGH + 3 MED + 1 LOW actionable) all fixed before merge:
- Product HIGH #1 (data integrity): booking upsert update-branch overwrote existing Client phone/email/comment with null because the booking form only collects name. Patched all 3 call-sites in apps/api/src/routes/bookings.ts with conditional spread so undefined fields are not sent to Prisma.
- Product HIGH #2 / #3 (UX clarity): ClientAutocomplete now shows 'Будет создан новый клиент' hint (ink-3, aria-live polite) when input has no exact match, and '✓ выбран существующий клиент' (emerald) after the user picks an existing one.
- Technical HIGH #1 (search correctness): SQLite LIKE is case-sensitive for non-ASCII. Autocomplete now fetches limit=50 superset and filters client-side via toLocaleLowerCase('ru'), so 'АРТ' matches 'арт-пикчерс'.
- Technical MED #2 (race safety): AbortController cancels in-flight fetches on new input, preventing late responses from clobbering fresher ones.
- Product MED #4 (canon consistency): /admin/clients delete no longer uses window.confirm. New DeleteConfirmModal follows RejectBookingModal pattern: aria-modal, Esc-close, backdrop dismissal, auto-focus primary action, rose destructive styling.
- Technical LOW #6 (regression guard): integration test in clients.test.ts asserts sparse PATCH (only name) leaves phone/email/comment untouched at both response and DB level.
